name: CMP_MKT_VND_SURVEYS_VL
query: SELECT B.MKT_SURVEY_ID, B.MKT_SURVEY_CODE, T.MKT_SURVEY_NAME, T.COMPENSATION_COVERAGE, T.INDUSTRY_COVERAGE, T.GEOGRAPHIC_COVERAGE, T.JOB_COVERAGE, T.NOTES, B.VENDOR_ID, B.STATUS, B.APPROX_NUM_COMPANIES, B.SURVEY_FEE_PARTICIPANT, B.SURVEY_FEE_NON_ARTICIPANT, B.MISC_1, B.MISC_2, B.MISC_3, B.COUNTRY, B.LOCATION, B.INDUSTRY, B.GROUPS, B.TEN_PERCENT, B.TWENTY_FIVE_PERCENT, B.FIFTY_PERCENT, B.SEVENTY_FIVE_PERCENT, B.NINTY_PERCENT, B.AVERAGE_MEAN, B.CURRENCY, B.PARTICIPATING_COMPANIES, B.PARTICIPATING_INCUMBANTS, B.MISC_NUMBER_1, B.MISC_NUMBER_1_DATA, B.MISC_NUMBER_2, B.MISC_NUMBER_2_DATA, B.MISC_NUMBER_3, B.MISC_NUMBER_3_DATA, B.MISC_NUMBER_4, B.MISC_NUMBER_4_DATA, B.MISC_TEXT_1, B.MISC_TEXT_1_DATA, B.MISC_TEXT_2, B.MISC_TEXT_2_DATA, B.MISC_TEXT_3, B.MISC_TEXT_3_DATA, B.PART_FEE_CURRENCY_CODE, B.NON_PART_FEE_CURRENCY_CODE, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.MISC_NUMBER_1_DATA2, B.MISC_NUMBER_2_DATA2, B.MISC_NUMBER_3_DATA2, B.MISC_NUMBER_4_DATA2, B.TWENTY_PERCENT, B.THIRTY_PERCENT, B.FORTY_PERCENT, B.SIXTY_PERCENT, B.SEVENTY_PERCENT, B.EIGHTY_PERCENT, B.ONE_HUNDRED_PERCENT FROM CMP_MKT_VND_SURVEYS_B B, CMP_MKT_VND_SURVEYS_TL T WHERE B.MKT_SURVEY_ID = T.MKT_SURVEY_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = T.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
